headline: Earnings Preview: What To Expect From O'Reilly Automotive's Report
summary: O'Reilly Automotive is scheduled to announce its first-quarter results soon, and analysts forecast a double-digit rise in the company’s bottom-line figure.

headline: O'Reilly (ORLY): 3 Reasons We Love This Stock
summary: Over the past six months, O'Reilly’s shares (currently trading at $92.14) have posted a disappointing 14.3% loss while the S&P 500 was down 1%. This was partly due to its softer quarterly results and may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Is O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Pricing In Too Much Growth After Recent Share Price Recovery?
summary: If you are wondering whether O'Reilly Automotive at around US$92.27 is offering good value today, the key is to separate share price moves from what the company might actually be worth. The stock has returned 5.0% over the last 7 days, while the 30 day return sits at a 2.2% decline and the year to date return is 2.1%, with a 1 year return of a 2.8% decline and longer term 3 and 5 year returns of 64.5% and 172.5% respectively.
